title: lastrea falconeri
intro: Lastrea falconeri, also known as the Falconer's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis. The health benefits of Lastrea falconeri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect the body from oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Lastrea falconeri are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
